description_long: This is a modern office desk setup placed on a seamless, curved white backdrop, reminiscent of a photography studio cyclorama. The desk is rectangular and made of light-colored wood, supported by four sturdy legs. On top of the desk sits a computer monitor, keyboard, and several small office accessories, suggesting a workspace environment. A black office chair with a high backrest is positioned in front of the desk, facing the monitor. The overall scene is minimalistic, with the desk and chair being the only furniture present, and the backdrop providing a clean, distraction-free environment. The lighting is even, highlighting the desk's clean lines and functional design.
description: A light wood office desk with a computer and accessories, paired with a black office chair, set against a seamless white backdrop. The setup is minimal and modern, evoking a professional workspace.
description_view_0: The desk and chair are seen from a distance, centered against the white curved backdrop, with the computer monitor and accessories visible.
description_view_1: The scene is viewed from the side, mostly showing the white backdrop with only the edge of the desk and chair barely visible.
description_view_2: The desk is viewed from behind, with the back of the chair and the rear of the monitor in view, emphasizing the workspace setup.
description_view_3: The desk and chair are seen from an angle, showing the side of the desk and the chair, with the monitor and accessories partially visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is where the chair and monitor are positioned, with the front of the desk intended for seating and computer use.
